description_long: This object is a decorative medal featuring a blue ribbon with a central vertical stripe, attached to a gold-toned crown and a Maltese cross pendant. The cross is white with red enamel inlays and gold borders, and a circular medallion at its center, which is inscribed with text and surrounded by a laurel wreath motif. The crown is detailed with small orbs and arches, adding a regal touch to the design. The ribbon is pleated and appears to be made of fabric, while the pendant and crown are metallic, likely gilded or gold-plated. The reverse side of the medal shows a plain red center on the cross, with the ribbon folded and stitched. The overall craftsmanship suggests a ceremonial or honorific purpose, with intricate details and a formal, prestigious appearance.
description: A ceremonial medal with a blue ribbon, gold crown, and a white-and-red Maltese cross pendant, featuring intricate metallic and enamel details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue ribbon, gold crown, and the detailed Maltese cross with a central medallion and visible inscription.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the ribbon and pendant, showing the layered construction and the three-dimensional relief of the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the folded and stitched ribbon, the plain red center of the cross, and less visible inscription details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the edge profile of the ribbon and pendant, emphasizing the depth and relief of the metallic elements.
